studyName: Innate Immune Anti-Viral Deaminase Deregulation Fuels Pre-Leukemia Stem Cell Evolution

variables.name: AGE
variables.description: Subject age at time of sample

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BLAST
variables.description: Percent blasts in bone marrow

variables.name: CANCER_TREATMENT
variables.description: Type of tumor treatment for sample

variables.name: CELL_SOURCE
variables.description: Tissue/cells collected for sample

variables.name: CELL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell subtypes collected for sample

variables.name: DIAGNOSIS
variables.description: Hematological diagnosis at time of sample

variables.name: GENOTYPING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted genotyping

variables.name: HGB
variables.description: Hemoglobin at time of sample

variables.name: IS_CANCER
variables.description: Cancer status. Differentiates between hematologically normal and malignant samples.

variables.name: PHASE_PROG_SCORE
variables.description: Phase/stage for chonic myeloid leukemia samples, DIPSS+ prognostic score for myelofibrosis samples.

variables.name: PLT
variables.description: Platelet count at time of sample

variables.name: PRIOR_DISEASE
variables.description: Hematological diagnosis prior to date of sample, indicating disease progression.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted sequencing

variables.name: WBC
variables.description: White blood cell count at time of sample

tables.description: This subject phenotypes data table includes mutation statuses for JAK2, CALR, FLT3, NPM1, KIT exon 7, and BCR-ABL fusion status.

variables.name: BCR-ABL MUTATION STATUS
variables.description: BCR-ABL fusion status clinically analyzed, by FISH and/or PCR, up to date of sample

variables.name: CALR MUTATION STATUS
variables.description: CALR mutation status clinically analyzed by PCR up to date of sample

variables.name: FLT3 MUTATION STATUS
variables.description: FLT3 mutation status

variables.name: JAK2 MUTATION STATUS
variables.description: JAK2 V617F mutation status clinically analyzed by PCR up to date of sample

variables.name: KIT MUTATION STATUS
variables.description: KIT exon 7 mutation status

variables.name: NPM1 MUTATION STATUS
variables.description: NPM1 mutation status

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Self-reported sex

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: This subject consent data table contains subject IDs, consent group information, and subject aliases.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID used in the Source Repository

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository where subjects originate

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
